prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~22.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.4 kg; Height 167.7 cm; BMI 25.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.5%; 9 months ago 8.9%; 6 months ago 9.4%; 3 months ago 9.9%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 235mg/dL; 9 months ago 248mg/dL; 6 months ago 265mg/dL; 3 months ago 283mg/dL; current 281mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.9kg; 9 months ago 72.2kg; 6 months ago 73.7kg; 3 months ago 68.6kg; current 71.4kg), Height (12 months ago 167.7cm; 9 months ago 167.7cm; 6 months ago 167.7cm; 3 months ago 167.7cm; current 167.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 26.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 25.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 82mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 85mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 6U/L; 9 months ago 7U/L; 6 months ago 15U/L; 3 months ago 8.0U/L; current 11U/L), AST (12 months ago 8U/L; 9 months ago 9U/L; 6 months ago 10U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 12U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 19mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; current 18mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 400mg/g; 9 months ago 328mg/g; 6 months ago 509mg/g; 3 months ago 398mg/g; current 492mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 77mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 57mg/dL; 9 months ago 60mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 58mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 161mg/dL; 9 months ago 145mg/dL; 6 months ago 141mg/dL; 3 months ago 161mg/dL; current 151mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
